scope: Split UploadDialog into a controller hook and view shell
Split FilePreviewContent into stage, text panel, and state components
Split MarkdownPreview into schema utilities and focused renderers
Fix the useThrottle React Compiler lint violation
assumptions: UploadDialog remains the public component entry point
Existing upload child components already cover visual sub-responsibilities
Unrelated scripts/codex-cli, workflow, and constraints changes are user work and must not be touched
risks: Folder query parameter propagation could regress
Close blocking during active uploads could regress
Markdown sanitize, image proxy, or code copy behavior could regress
